body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Personality assessment with Temperament and Character Inventory in Parkinson'sdisease.**. Parkinsonism Relat Disord.. PMID: 36030666. DOI: 10.1016/j.parkreldis.2022.08.004. INTRODUCTION: There is agrowing interest in personality evaluation in Parkinson'sdisease (PD), following observations of specific temperaments in PD patients. Therefore, our objective was to evaluate personality dimensions from the Temperament and Character Inventory (TCI) in acohort of fluctuating PD patients considered for deep brain stimulation.
